metaDesc: Public disclaimer for WPA Institute Index, benchmarks and analytical materials.
title: Public Disclaimer
deck: On the nature and limits of WPA indexes, benchmarks and institutional comparisons.
k001: World Protocol Academy publishes indexes, benchmark materials and institutional comparisons in the field of protocol, diplomacy, public communication and security. This disclaimer explains what they are — and what they are not.
k003: WPA is not a state accreditation institution.
k004: WPA indexes and benchmark materials are analytical and educational tools.
k005: They are not legal judgments, professional licences or official rankings.
k006: Data is based on publicly available sources, methodology and human review.
k008: If you believe a WPA index or benchmark entry about your institution is inaccurate, you may request a correction. See the Correction Request page.
